title: calanthe labiata
intro: Calanthe labiata, also known as the Lip Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calanthe labiata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, Calanthe labiata is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal supplements and tinctures.
